research.title: Adaptive User Interface for Mobile Banking Apps: Enhancing UX through Machine Learning
research.authors: Khaled Hasan, Md Rashid Ul Islam, Sheikh Easin Arafat, Iyolita Islam
research.summary: An adaptive UI framework that uses machine learning on user interaction patterns to dynamically personalize mobile banking app interfaces, improving user experience.

press.title: The need for cybersecurity education in Bangladeshi universities
press.summary: Featured for the events and CTFs led by MIST Cyber Security Club in 2023, with commentary on the state of cybersecurity education in Bangladesh.
